mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password}
SELECT * FROM user ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM user ORDER BY id LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user(username, password, real_name, role, create_time) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{role}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username=#{username}, real_name=#{realName}, role=#{role} WHERE id=#{id}
